items.title: Report: Samsung To End LPDDR4 RAM Production In Favour Of LPDDR5
items.summary:
The ongoing “RAMpocalypse” continues to impact both consumers and manufacturers, as global memory supply struggles to keep pace with demand. Amid this shift, Samsung is reportedly phasing out its LPDDR4 memory, has already stopped accepting new orders, and is now preparing to shift production toward newer LPDDR5 RAM, or so a report claims. The report […]
